questions: How do I learn sign language?
Is sign language the same everywhere?
answers: Sign language is a visual communication system using hand gestures, facial expressions, and body movements, used primarily by deaf and hard-of-hearing communities.
Sign language holo haat er gesture, facial expression, ar body movement diye kotha bola — mainly deaf community use korey.
You can learn sign language through online courses, YouTube tutorials, community classes, or apps like Signly. Regular practice with native signers helps the most.
No, sign language varies by country — American Sign Language (ASL), British Sign Language (BSL), and others are distinct languages with their own grammar and vocabulary.
